summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TUDOaqui Account page and Admin Upgrades tab features. All new features working correctly. Backend: 9/10 tests passed (1 test failed due to test user already having the requested role from previous test run - expected behavior). Frontend: All Account page features working (profile display, edit profile, upgrade request form, request history). Admin Upgrades tab fully functional with filter buttons and approve/reject actions.
critical_code_review_comments: Account page has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Upgrade section correctly hidden for admin users
Upgrade options correctly exclude user's current role
Pending request message shown when user has pending upgrade request
Request history shows status badges (pendente/aprovado/rejeitado) correctly
Admin Upgrades tab has filter buttons working correctly
Approve/Reject buttons only shown on pending requests
Admin notes displayed on processed requests
Role upgrade correctly updates user role on approval

success_rate.backend: 90% (9/10 tests passed - 1 test failed due to test data state, not a bug)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Account page and Admin Upgrades tab features working

test_credentials.otp_retrieval: su - postgres -c "psql -d tudoaqui -t -A -c \"SELECT codigo FROM otp_codes WHERE telefone='<PHONE>' AND verificado=false ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;\""

account_page.profile_card: Shows user name, phone, role badge, email, creation date
account_page.edit_profile_modal: Opens with name/email fields, saves correctly
account_page.upgrade_section: Shows available roles (excludes current role), hidden for admin
account_page.upgrade_form_modal: Opens with role dropdown and motivo textarea
account_page.request_history: Shows all user's requests with status badges
account_page.pending_request_message: Shows message when user has pending request

admin_upgrades_tab.filter_buttons: Todos, Pendente, Aprovado, Rejeitado - all working
admin_upgrades_tab.request_cards: Show user info, current role -> requested role, motivo, date
admin_upgrades_tab.approve_button: Approves request and upgrades user role
admin_upgrades_tab.reject_button: Rejects request without changing user role

context_for_next_testing_agent: Account page and Admin Upgrades tab fully functional. Test users created: +244911666666 (vendedor, upgraded via UI), +244911777777 (cliente), +244911888888 (cliente, rejected request), +244911999999 (organizador, approved via API). Rate limiter active (5 min cooldown for OTP requests). To bypass rate limiter during testing, get OTP from DB after login request.

mocked_apis.sms_provider: Africa's Talking is in SANDBOX mode - OTPs are stored in PostgreSQL otp_codes table instead of being sent via real SMS
